sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Marvel Rivals Version 20260219 Patch Notes
feed.summary: Marvel Rivals is releasing a new patch on February 19th, 2026, at 09:00:00 (UTC) with no server downtime. The update introduces new events, "Faulty Dream" and "Twisted Nightmare," offering free costumes and other rewards. Additionally, new in-store bundles, character costumes, and emotes for heroes like Iron Man, Emma Frost, and Scarlet Witch will be available immediately and in the following week.

feed.title: PBI Q4 Deep Dive: Restructuring, New Leadership, and Competitive Pricing Shape Outlook
feed.summary: Pitney Bowes (PBI) missed Q4 CY2025 revenue expectations but beat non-GAAP profit estimates due to operational restructuring, leadership changes, and cost control. The company's management highlighted aggressive pricing in Presort, new executive hires, and operational streamlining as key drivers for future performance. Pitney Bowes anticipates gradual improvements in its core businesses, including Presort recovery, SendTech stabilization, and growth opportunities with Pitney Bowes Bank, while acknowledging

feed.title: Hecla Mining’s Stock Surges Amid Transformative Developments
feed.summary: Hecla Mining (HL) has seen its stock surge following reports of favorable market sentiment, driven by its 2025 financial performance, including a revenue of over $1.4B and significant debt reduction. The company's strategic decision to sell its Casa Berardi asset for $593M aligns it with a focused silver production strategy and increased exploration in key U.S. locations. Analysts have raised price targets, reflecting optimism about its strong balance sheet and the increasing demand for precious metals.

feed.title: Grand Canyon Education: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Grand Canyon Education Inc. (LOPE) reported a profit of $86.7 million in its fourth quarter, translating to $3.14 per share, or an adjusted $3.21 per share. The for-profit education company also posted fourth-quarter revenue of $308.1 million. For the full year, the company had a profit of $216.2 million ($7.71 per share) on revenue of $1.11 billion.

feed.title: DA Davidson raises Knife River stock price target on improved results
feed.summary: DA Davidson has increased its price target for Knife River Corp. (NYSE:KNF) to $105 from $95, maintaining a Buy rating, following strong Q4 results and 2026 guidance. The stock has seen significant gains recently, trading at $92.50. Another firm, Stephens, also raised its target to $105 due to exceeding expectations in earnings and revenue.

feed.title: Q2 Named Market Leader in U.S. Retail Digital Banking by Datos Insights
feed.summary: Q2 Holdings, Inc. has been recognized as a Market Leader in U.S. Retail Digital Banking by Datos Insights, receiving the highest distinction in their February 2026 report. The company was lauded for its enterprise-scale market penetration, platform maturity, vendor stability, and the significant client impact and outcomes it delivers to its 446 financial institution clients. This recognition highlights Q2's ability to help banks and credit unions achieve digital transformation and compete effectively in the evolving financial services landscape.

feed.title: Mobilicom stock initiated with Buy rating at Litchfield Hills on drone tech potential
feed.summary: Mobilicom Ltd (NASDAQ:MOB) has received a "Buy" rating initiation from Litchfield Hills Research with a $10.00 price target, based on its potential in drone technology. The firm highlights Mobilicom as a unique small-cap UAS technology company serving military and commercial clients, noting its strong financials and recent milestone of its SkyHopper product being placed on the Defense Innovation Unit’s Blue List. Recent orders and leadership appointments further underscore the company's growth and strategic advancements.

feed.title: NeoGenomics (NEO) Stock Drops After 2026 Outlook Misses Expectations - News and Statistics
feed.summary: NeoGenomics (NEO) stock declined over 10% after its 2026 financial forecast, including adjusted earnings per share and adjusted EBITDA, fell short of analyst expectations, overshadowing strong fourth-quarter revenue growth. The company reported a net loss of $108 million for full-year 2025, a 37% increase, and its stock has been highly volatile, down 13% since the start of 2026. This performance underscores the market's negative reaction to the weaker outlook despite positive quarterly revenue figures.

feed.title: Paulson Trims Madrigal Stake As Equity Grants Highlight Valuation Gap
feed.summary: John Paulson has notably reduced his stake in Madrigal Pharmaceuticals, though it remains his largest holding, while the company has issued significant equity grants to new employees. This move, combined with the stock trading below analyst targets and estimated fair value, suggests a reshuffling of influence and a focus on talent acquisition. Investors are advised to monitor insider transactions and share-based compensation as these developments unfold.

feed.title: Chilton Investment Co LLC Boosts Apple Stake by 4,741 Shares
feed.summary: Chilton Investment Co LLC, managed by Richard Chilton, has increased its stake in Apple Inc. (AAPL) by 4,741 shares. Apple shares have been flat to slightly lower over the last month but are up low-to-mid teens percent over the past year, with analysts projecting meaningful upside. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates AAPL an "Outperform" due to strong financial performance and a constructive earnings outlook, despite some technical and valuation risks.

feed.title: Enterprise Network Equipment Market Size | CAGR of 13.4%
feed.summary: The global Enterprise Network Equipment Market is projected to grow from USD 105.78 billion in 2025 to USD 371.99 billion by 2035, exhibiting a CAGR of 13.4%. North America currently dominates the market. The market growth is driven by the increasing data traffic, adoption of cloud computing, and the need for robust network infrastructure to support digital transformation and hybrid work models.

feed.title: Gilder Gagnon Howe Trims Alphabet Inc. Class A Stake
feed.summary: Gilder Gagnon Howe & Co LLC, managed by Travis Knapp Anderson, recently reduced its stake in Alphabet Inc. Class A (GOOGL) by 7,262 shares. Despite this, Alphabet Class A has performed strongly, surging 66%-75% over the past year, with analysts maintaining "Strong Buy" ratings due to impressive Q4 2025 results and strong AI and cloud initiatives. TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, rates GOOGL as "Outperform" due to strong financial quality, though it notes risks from premium valuation and capital expenditure.

feed.title: Alua Capital Management LP Cuts Alphabet Inc. Class A Stake
feed.summary: Alua Capital Management LP, managed by Tom Purcell, recently reduced its stake in Alphabet Inc. Class A (GOOGL) by selling 100,000 shares. This transaction comes as Alphabet Class A shares have seen significant growth over the past year and month, with analysts maintaining a "Strong Buy" rating. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates GOOGL as "Outperform" due to its strong financial quality, though it notes concerns about technical momentum, premium valuation, and future capital intensity.

feed.title: Blue Grotto Capital Boosts Alphabet Inc. Stake by 87K
feed.summary: Blue Grotto Capital, LLC, managed by Ben Gordon, has significantly increased its stake in Alphabet Inc. Class C (GOOG) by acquiring an additional 87,913 shares. Alphabet Class C stock has seen substantial growth over the past year, with analysts maintaining a "Strong Buy" consensus, despite warnings about increased capital expenditure in 2026. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates GOOG as "Outperform" due to its strong financial performance and technical trend, though tempered by its premium valuation and potential near-term cash flow pressure from large CapEx.

feed.title: Woodline Partners LP Boosts Alphabet Inc. Stake by 180,542 Shares
feed.summary: Woodline Partners LP, managed by Michael Rockefeller, significantly increased its holdings in Alphabet Inc. Class C (GOOG) by 180,542 shares. Alphabet's stock has seen substantial growth over the past year, driven by strong performance in Search and Cloud, and a large backlog. While projected 2026 capital expenditures might temporarily impact free cash flow, the company is viewed as having a dominant, AI-driven growth trajectory, with TipRanks' AI Analyst Spark rating GOOG as Outperform.

feed.title: Gilder Gagnon Howe Trims Alphabet Inc. Class C Stake
feed.summary: Gilder Gagnon Howe & Co LLC, managed by Travis Knapp Anderson, recently reduced its stake in Alphabet Inc. Class C (GOOG) by 9,793 shares. Despite recent volatility, Wall Street analysts maintain a "Strong Buy" rating for GOOG, with average 12-month targets between $366 and $384, driven by strong Search and Google Cloud growth, and ongoing AI strategy. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, also rates GOOG as "Outperform" due to strong financial performance and technical trends, though it notes concerns about premium valuation and large planned capital expenditures for 2026.

feed.title: Farallon Capital Boosts Broadcom Stake With 892,400 Shares
feed.summary: Farallon Capital Management, led by Andrew J.M. Spokes, significantly increased its stake in Broadcom Inc. (AVGO) by adding 892,400 shares. Despite recent stock volatility, Wall Street analysts maintain a "Strong Buy" rating for Broadcom due to its AI ASIC partnership with Google and strong EPS growth forecasts, although some caution regarding potential internalization of hardware by hyperscalers exists. TipRanks' AI Analyst also rates AVGO as "Outperform" citing strong financial performance and upbeat earnings outlook, balanced against a stretched valuation and mixed technical indicators.

feed.title: Gladstone Capital Management Trims Microsoft Stake by 21,789 Shares
feed.summary: Gladstone Capital Management, managed by David Gladstone, recently decreased its stake in Microsoft (MSFT) by 21,789 shares. Despite recent volatility and some pullback, Microsoft maintains a StrongBuy consensus from analysts, with substantial upside targets driven by strong cloud and AI momentum. However, some analysts, like Stifel's Brad Reback, have downgraded the stock due to concerns about Azure capacity constraints and significant AI infrastructure spending.

feed.title: Graham Capital’s Kenneth Tropin Boosts Alphabet Inc. Stake
feed.summary: Kenneth Tropin's Graham Capital Management recently increased its stake in Alphabet Inc. Class A (GOOGL) by 2,160 shares. This transaction follows a significant surge in Alphabet's shares over the past year, driven by strong Q4 2025 results, rapid growth in Search and Cloud, and Gemini-powered AI. Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, rates GOOGL as "Outperform" due to strong financial quality, though it notes moderating factors like technical momentum and premium valuation.

feed.title: First Pacific Advisors Cuts Alphabet Inc. Class A Stake
feed.summary: First Pacific Advisors LLC, managed by Richard Atwood, has reduced its stake in Alphabet Inc. Class A (GOOGL) by 510,890 shares. Despite this, Alphabet Class A shares have seen significant gains over the past year, driven by strong Q4 2025 results and AI-driven growth. TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, rates GOOGL as "Outperform" due to its financial quality, though moderated by valuation and near-term capital intensity risks.

feed.title: Farallon Capital trims Alphabet Inc. stake by 333,900 shares
feed.summary: Farallon Capital Management, L.L.C. has reduced its holding in Alphabet Inc. Class C (GOOG) by 333,900 shares. Despite this trim, Alphabet Class C stock has seen significant gains over the past year, and analysts maintain a Strong Buy rating, projecting further upside. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates GOOG as "Outperform," citing strong financial performance, though noting concerns about premium valuation and near-term cash flow pressure due to planned capital expenditures.

feed.title: Tiger Global’s Chase Coleman cuts Broadcom Inc. stake
feed.summary: Tiger Global Management LLC, led by Chase Coleman, reduced its stake in Broadcom Inc. (AVGO) by 14,000 shares. Despite recent stock volatility, Wall Street analysts largely maintain a Strong Buy rating due to Broadcom's strong role in AI and networking, though some caution about potential margin pressures on its AI ASIC business. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates AVGO as "Outperform" due to strong financials and AI growth, balanced against a stretched valuation.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson exec VP, CFO Wolk sells $21.7 million in stock
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson's Executive Vice President and CFO, Joseph J. Wolk, sold 84,654 shares of company stock for approximately $21.7 million and exercised options to acquire 66,475 shares. Following the transactions, Wolk directly owns 38,961 shares, with additional indirect holdings. Separately, Johnson & Johnson plans a new cell therapy manufacturing facility and faces a $250,000 talc powder lawsuit verdict, while analysts from RBC Capital and Morgan Stanley have increased their price targets for the stock.

feed.title: Indonesia deal aims to extend giant Grasberg copper and gold mine
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan (NYSE: FCX) has announced a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with the Indonesian government to extend the operating rights for PT Freeport Indonesia (PTFI) in the Grasberg minerals district. This agreement provides for a life-of-resource extension, increased community support in Papua, enhanced exploration spending, and continued prioritization of domestic downstreaming. FCX will maintain a significant ownership interest in PTFI through 2041 and beyond, ensuring continued operations at one of the world's largest copper and gold deposits.

feed.title: MANITOWOC CO INC SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: The Manitowoc Company, Inc. (MTW) has released its 2025 Form 10-K report, detailing its financial performance, business operations, and strategic initiatives. The report highlights increased net sales and gross profit, though net income and diluted EPS decreased due to income tax provisions. Manitowoc is pursuing a "CRANES+50" strategy, focusing on non-new machine sales and aftermarket services, while navigating market competition, macroeconomic challenges, and supply chain risks.

feed.title: Medallion Financial (MFIN) Reports Strong Q4 Earnings and Loan G
feed.summary: Medallion Financial Corp (MFIN) reported strong Q4 earnings with net interest income exceeding expectations at $56.4 million and a net income of $12.2 million. The company saw a significant increase in loan originations, reaching $421.3 million, largely due to strategic partnerships, and an improved net interest margin of 8.04%. Despite robust financial health indicated by revenue growth and profitability, Medallion's financial strength is considered poor due to high debt levels, though its Beneish M-Score suggests it's unlikely to be a manipulator.

feed.title: RBC Capital lowers Loar Holdings stock price target on estimate update
feed.summary: RBC Capital has lowered its price target for Loar Holdings Inc. (NYSE:LOAR) to $90 from $92 but maintained an Outperform rating. The adjustment follows an update of estimates to reflect recent acquisitions of LMB Fans & Motors and Harper Engineering, with the firm believing these acquisitions offer significant cross-selling opportunities and margin improvements. Despite a high P/E ratio, Loar's PEG ratio suggests it may be undervalued given its growth potential, and analyst consensus remains strongly bullish.

feed.title: Hafnia tied to string of product tanker sales after receiving newbuilding quartet
feed.summary: Hafnia, a shipping giant controlled by BW Group, has reportedly sold as many as 15 aging product tankers since the summer of 2025. This move comes after the company received a quartet of newbuild vessels. Mikael Skov, Hafnia's chief executive, commented on their strategy at the Global Maritime Summit.

feed.title: Investors Title (ITIC) Margin Improvement Tests Long Term Earnings Decline Narrative
feed.summary: Investors Title (ITIC) recently reported strong Q4 2025 results with improved net margins and significant trailing 12-month earnings growth, which challenges its five-year earnings decline narrative. Despite a P/E ratio higher than peers, the company's recent profitability supports its current valuation, suggesting a nuanced investment outlook. Investors are left to weigh the recent positive performance against the longer-term trend of declining earnings.

feed.title: Coca-Cola sued by federal agency over work event that excluded men
feed.summary: The U.S. Equal Employment Opportunity Commission (EEOC) has filed a lawsuit against Coca-Cola Beverages Northeast, alleging sexual discrimination. The lawsuit claims Coca-Cola violated federal law by holding a women-only networking event in September 2024, excluding male employees. This marks the first workplace diversity lawsuit filed by the EEOC during President Trump's second term.

feed.title: Does Wells Fargo’s New Bond Deals And Preferred Payouts Shift Its Funding Story For WFC?
feed.summary: Wells Fargo recently completed new fixed-rate, callable senior unsecured note offerings and declared quarterly dividends on preferred stock. These actions are part of the bank's strategy to manage funding, investor payouts, and ongoing legal and regulatory obligations. While analysts focus on regulatory relief and earnings, these financial moves highlight the careful balance Wells Fargo maintains amidst its growth ambitions and compliance costs.

feed.title: Is Revvity (RVTY) Now Offering Value After Recent Share Price Weakness
feed.summary: Revvity (RVTY) has experienced recent share price weakness, with declines over the past week, month, and year. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is undervalued by 29.0% at its current price of US$97.74, with an estimated intrinsic value of $137.75 per share. However, its current P/E ratio of 46.19x is higher than Simply Wall St's proprietary "Fair Ratio" of 24.83x, indicating it might be overvalued by that metric.

feed.title: Evercore Notes AbbVie Inc.’s (ABBV) Tremfya Gains Market Share, But Future Earnings Growth May Be Limited
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has lowered its price target for AbbVie (ABBV) to $228 from $232, while maintaining an Outperform rating. The firm acknowledges that Tremfya is gaining market share and that AbbVie's 2026 and 2027 guidance seems achievable. However, Evercore notes that buy-side projections have consistently exceeded consensus, suggesting future earnings growth might be limited, and investor focus is shifting to growth beyond 2028 due to anticipated rival treatments.

feed.title: A Look At Emerson Electric (EMR) Valuation As Fresh Analyst Endorsements Draw New Attention
feed.summary: Emerson Electric (EMR) recently secured a new US$2 billion 364-day credit facility, providing significant liquidity as the company integrates past acquisitions and pursues growth. Despite a strong three-year total shareholder return of 94.44% and a current stock price of US$151.14, Simply Wall St's analysis suggests the stock is 8.1% undervalued with a fair value of $164.51. However, its P/E ratio of 36.9x is slightly above the industry average, indicating the market is already paying a premium.

feed.title: Texas Instruments By Law Shift Reframes Legal Risks And Valuation Context
feed.summary: Texas Instruments has amended its bylaws, designating the Delaware Court of Chancery for internal corporate disputes and federal courts for US securities claims. This governance change for investors in NasdaqGS:TXN comes alongside a share price of $223.32 and significant multi-year returns. While the stock has strong recent momentum, Simply Wall St identifies valuation risk and concerns about dividend coverage.

feed.title: Jefferies Assigns 65–75% Probability of Best-in-Class Efficacy for Definium Therapeutics, Inc.’s (DFTX) DT120 in Phase III
feed.summary: Jefferies has initiated coverage of Definium Therapeutics, Inc. (DFTX) with a Buy rating and a $30 price target, highlighting a 48% remission rate for their lead candidate, DT120, in a Phase IIb trial for generalized anxiety disorder. The firm assigns a 65-75% probability of DT120 achieving best-in-class efficacy in upcoming Phase III trials. Additionally, Baird raised its price target for DFTX to $37, and the company appointed Roger Adsett to its Board of Directors.

feed.title: BofA Military Interest Cap Suit Should Be Tossed, Judge Says
feed.summary: A North Carolina magistrate judge has recommended dismissing a proposed class action lawsuit against Bank of America. The suit alleged the bank violated an interest cap law for military service members. The judge stated that the veteran plaintiffs failed to demonstrate any actual violations of federal or state law.

feed.title: Integra Resources Acquires 6,600-Acre Ranch Adjacent To DeLamar Project For $12.5 Million
feed.summary: Integra Resources has acquired a 6,600-acre ranch adjacent to its DeLamar Project in Idaho for $12.5 million. This acquisition is strategic, aiming to de-risk the project by consolidating land ownership, securing mitigation habitat, and increasing operational flexibility, supporting responsible development in alignment with local communities. The company recently completed a $61 million financing to fund such initiatives, enhancing the DeLamar Project's path towards construction.

feed.title: Kadant Inc (NYSE:KAI) Beats Q4 Estimates and Provides Upbeat Revenue Guidance
feed.summary: Kadant Inc (NYSE:KAI) reported strong fourth-quarter results, exceeding analyst expectations for both revenue and non-GAAP EPS. Despite positive earnings and upbeat revenue guidance for Q1 2026, the stock's market reaction has been subdued. The company's performance signals resilience in its core industrial markets and management's confidence in near-term demand.

feed.title: Form 424B2 BARCLAYS BANK PLC
feed.summary: This Form 424B2 filing by Barclays Bank PLC details the offering of $1,026,000 Contingent Coupon Barrier Notes due February 16, 2029, linked to the performance of the Nasdaq-100, Russell 2000, and S&P 500 Indices. The notes offer contingent coupon payments based on the performance of the least performing index but do not guarantee principal repayment or fixed interest, exposing investors to potential significant losses including 100% of the principal at maturity. The document outlines the terms, risks, tax considerations, and includes a consent to U.K. Bail-in Power, highlighting that payments are subject to Barclays Bank PLC's creditworthiness and regulatory actions.

feed.title: iShares Russell 3000 ETF Implements Key Index and Distribution Changes
feed.summary: The iShares Russell 3000 ETF (IWV) is undergoing significant changes, including a shift to semi-annual index rebalancing by FTSE Russell and LSEG to better reflect market dynamics. The ETF, with substantial holdings in the technology sector, is also approaching its ex-dividend date on March 17, 2026, with payment scheduled for March 20, 2026. This move to more frequent rebalancing aims to enhance reactivity to corporate events and provide a more precise reflection of the market, which investors will monitor for its impact on portfolio turnover and market representation.

feed.title: JLL Earnings Beat Helps Push Back Against AI Scare in CRE Stocks
feed.summary: JLL reported strong Q4 2025 earnings, with revenue up 10% year-over-year and full-year revenue increasing by 11% from 2024, largely driven by transactional businesses like leasing and capital markets. This positive performance led to a jump in JLL's stock, counteracting recent investor anxieties about AI disruption in commercial real estate services. The company emphasized its proprietary data and technology as a competitive advantage, suggesting that embracing technology enhances efficiency rather than diminishes relationship-driven services.

feed.title: Gladstone Commercial earnings beat by $0.03, revenue topped estimates
feed.summary: Gladstone Commercial (NASDAQ: GOOD) reported better-than-expected earnings and revenue for the fourth quarter. The company's EPS beat analyst estimates by $0.03, and its revenue surpassed the consensus estimate. Despite recent stock performance showing a decline over the last 12 months, its financial health is rated as "good performance" by InvestingPro.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Leann Smith Sells 190 Shares of McKesson Corp (MCK)
feed.summary: Leann Smith, Executive Vice President & Chief Human Resources Officer at McKesson Corp, sold 190 shares of the company on February 17, 2026. This transaction increased her total holdings to 2,989 shares. Over the past year, Smith has sold 1,940 shares with no purchases, and the company has seen 25 insider sells and no buys. McKesson Corp's stock is currently trading at $945 per share, with a market capitalization of $115.99 billion, and is considered modestly overvalued based on its GF Value.

feed.title: MITSUI SUMITOMO INSURANCE CO LTD Increases Stake in WR Berkley C
feed.summary: MITSUI SUMITOMO INSURANCE CO LTD, a 10% owner of WR Berkley Corp (WRB), purchased 566,386 shares on February 18, 2026, increasing its total holdings to 57,163,038 shares. This purchase is part of a trend of 8,561,450 shares acquired by the insider over the past year with no sales, aligning with WR Berkley Corp's overall insider activity of 16 buys and no sells. The stock is currently trading at $70.92, with a market cap of $26.7 billion, and is deemed fairly valued according to its GF Value of $67.40.

feed.title: Vietnam island carrier bets on 40 Boeing 787s to draw global tourists
feed.summary: Boeing and new Vietnamese carrier Sun PhuQuoc Airways announced an order for up to 40 787-9 Dreamliner jets to support the airline's long-haul strategy and connect Phu Quoc island with major cities globally. This is the largest Boeing widebody order in Vietnamese history, aiming to significantly boost tourism to the island. The 787-9's long range and passenger comfort features are central to Sun PhuQuoc's plan to make Phu Quoc a global tourist destination.

feed.title: Boeing and Sun PhuQuoc Airways Announce Order for Up to 40 787 Dreamliner Jets
feed.summary: Boeing and Sun PhuQuoc Airways announced an order for up to 40 787 Dreamliner jets, marking the new Vietnamese airline's first direct jet purchase. This move is intended to boost tourism and the economy on Vietnam's largest island, Phu Quoc, by connecting it internationally. The 787-9 Dreamliner's efficiency and range will allow Sun PhuQuoc Airways to establish new long-haul routes to Asia, Europe, and North America, leveraging Vietnam's rapidly growing aviation market.

feed.title: Over 1,000 Evergy customers offline due to mid evening power outage in Emporia
feed.summary: Over 1,000 Evergy customers in Emporia are without power due to a mid-evening outage that began around 7:30 PM. The outage has affected a significant area and disabled traffic lights at several intersections. Initial indications suggest a blown transformer may be the cause, with Evergy estimating power restoration by 9 PM.

feed.title: Keros Therapeutics Announces Participation at Upcoming Healthcare Conferences
feed.summary: Keros Therapeutics, Inc., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, announced its participation in three upcoming healthcare conferences in late February and early March 2026. President and CEO Jasbir S. Seehra, Ph.D., will present at these events, which include the Oppenheimer 36th Annual Healthcare Life Sciences Conference, TD Cowen 46th Annual Health Care Conference, and Leerink Partners Global Healthcare Conference. The company focuses on developing therapeutics for disorders linked to dysfunctional TGF-ß family protein signaling.

feed.title: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC Investigates Adequacy of Price and Process in Proposed Sale of Masimo Corporation - MASI
feed.summary: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF) is investigating the proposed sale of Masimo Corporation (NasdaqGS: MASI) to Danaher Corporation (NYSE: DHR) for $180.00 per share in cash. The law firm is examining whether this consideration and the process leading to the transaction adequately value Masimo. Shareholders who believe the Company is undervalued are encouraged to contact KSF to discuss their legal rights.
